qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_solicitud as oi_solicitud, t0.c_solicitud as c_solicitud, t0.d_solicitud as d_solicitud, t0.f_solicitud as f_solicitud, t0.d_aplicacion as d_aplicacion, t0.l_req_presup as l_req_presup, t0.l_inc_a_base as l_inc_a_base, t0.f_solicitud_cli as f_solicitud_cli, t0.f_estim_implem as f_estim_implem, t0.f_implem as f_implem, t0.f_estado as f_estado, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.c_reclamo as c_reclamo, t0.l_envio_mail as l_envio_mail, t0.c_formulario as c_formulario, SEC.policy, t0.c_solicitud as CODE, t0.d_solicitud as TEXT, t0.oi_contacto as oi_contacto, t0.oi_origen as oi_origen, t0.oi_error as oi_error, t0.oi_recurso as oi_recurso, t0.oi_version_base as oi_version_base, t0.oi_version_implem as oi_version_implem, t0.oi_modulo as oi_modulo, t0.oi_clasificacion as oi_clasificacion, t0.oi_centro_costo as oi_centro_costo FROM PRY07_SOLICITUDES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.SOLICITUD\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_solicitud LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_solicitud asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_solicitud as oi_solicitud, SEC.policy FROM PRY07_SOLICITUDES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.SOLICITUD\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_solicitud LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_solicitud asc')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Registra los Documentos digitales de la solicitud.
assosiation.label: Documentos Digitales Solicitudes
assosiation.name: DOC_DIG_SOL

qry:select.name: NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.SOLICITUD.QUERY
NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.SOLICITUD.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PRY07_SOLICITUDES.oi_solicitud) as CNT from PRY07_SOLICITUDES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PRY07_SOLICITUDES.oi_solicitud={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PRY07_SOLICITUDES.d_solicitud,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PRY07_SOLICITUDES.c_solicitud,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Llama a los métodos para enviar los mails luego de creada la solicitud.
method.label: send_mails_solicitud
method.name: send_mails_solicitud

qry:select.name: SQL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select count(A.oi_tarea) as cant from PRY02_TAREAS as A where A.c_estado!=\'F\' and A.c_estado!=\'A\' and A.oi_solicitud={#PARAM:@oi_solicitud} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-OTHER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select A.c_estado, count(A.oi_tarea) as cant from PRY02_TAREAS as A where (A.c_estado=\'F\' or A.c_estado=\'A\') and A.oi_solicitud={#PARAM:@oi_solicitud} group by A.c_estado ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <object edit_time="20121018105056" edit_user="lleoni" new_time="20121017174427" new_user="lleoni" version="2" nmd-A="1" nmd-C="1" nmd-R="1" class="NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.SOLICITUD" id="1295" nmd-status="~u,O_MOTIVO,C_ESTADO,F_ESTADO,"> <SOLICITUD descr="[2012 0014] ANALISIS DE CLICK VIEW" l_envio_mail="1" c_estado="5" f_estado="20121207092354" f_estim_implem="20121022174028" l_inc_a_base="0" l_req_presup="0" o_detalle="PROYECTO TABLERO" f_solicitud="20121017" d_solicitud="ANALISIS DE CLICK VIEW" c_solicitud="2012 0014" id="1295" nmd-status="~u,O_MOTIVO,C_ESTADO,F_ESTADO," o_motivo="Motivo de cierre de la solicitud [2012 0014] ANALISIS DE CLICK VIEW"> <oi_contacto value="5"/> <oi_origen/> <oi_error value="3"/> <oi_recurso value="3"/> <oi_version_base/> <oi_version_implem/> <oi_modulo value="20"/> <oi_clasificacion value="2"/> <oi_centro_costo value="286"/> <DOC_DIG_SOL/> </SOLICITUD> </object>
resource.name: qry_tareas_solicitud

qry:select.name: qry
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT pt.oi_tarea , pt.oi_solicitud FROM PRY02_TAREAS as pt WHERE pt.oi_solicitud = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ps.n_cantidad_horas, pc.oi_cliente FROM PRY08_CLIENTES AS pc, PRY08_SOPORTE AS ps JOIN pc.oi_cliente INNER ps.oi_cliente WHERE pc.oi_cliente = {#PARAM:@oi_cliente} AND ps.f_desde <= Now() AND (ps.f_hasta >= Now() OR ISNULL(ps.f_hasta)) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_horas_soporte
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT pt2.e_duracion, put1.e_minutos FROM PRY08_PRY_SOPORTE AS pps, PRY01_PROYECTOS AS pp, PRY02_TAREAS AS pt, PRY04_TRABAJOS AS pt2, PRY08_CLIENTES AS pc, PRY03_UND_TIEMPO AS put1 JOIN pc.oi_cliente INNER pps.oi_cliente, pps.oi_proyecto INNER pp.oi_proyecto, pp.oi_proyecto INNER pt.oi_pry_imputa, pt.oi_tarea INNER pt2.oi_tarea, pt2.oi_unidad_tiempo INNER put1.oi_unidad_tiempo WHERE GETPER(pt2.f_fecha) = {substring(Now(),0,6)} AND pc.oi_cliente = {#PARAM:@oi_cliente} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare:
<object edit_time="20120813181052" edit_user="gmartinez" new_time="20120813181052" new_user="gmartinez" version="1" nmd-A="1" nmd-C="1" nmd-R="1" class="NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.SOLICITUD" id="6693"> <SOLICITUD descr="[2012 1912] Cambio en la fecha de asignacion" c_reclamo="7314" c_estado="3" f_estado="20120813" l_inc_a_base="0" l_req_presup="0" o_detalle="Buenas Tardes, necesitamos realizar un cambio en la fecha de asignacion, pero no tenemos perfil aun para hacerlo. Quien podria realizar dicha modificacion?
" f_solicitud="20120813" d_solicitud="Cambio en la fecha de asignacion" c_solicitud="2012 1912" id="6693"> <oi_contacto value="162" /> <oi_origen value="5" /> <oi_error value="3" /> <oi_recurso value="18" /> <oi_version_base /> <oi_version_implem /> <oi_modulo value="37" /> <DOC_DIG_SOL /> </SOLICITUD> </object>
resource.name: alertaSolicitudes

qry:select.name: qry
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT pry07_solicitudes.oi_solicitud, pry07_solicitudes.f_solicitud FROM pry07_solicitudes, pry13_errores JOIN pry07_solicitudes.oi_error INNER pry13_errores.oi_error WHERE pry13_errores.d_nombre = \'ALTA\' AND pry07_solicitudes.c_estado NOT IN (\'5\',\'6\',\'7\') ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT pr.oi_recurso FROM PRY05_RECURSOS as pr , PER01_PERSONAL as pp JOIN pr.oi_personal INNER pp.oi_personal WHERE pp.oi_usuario_sistema = {#PROXY:@ETTY} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_proyecto
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PRY.oi_proyecto , PRY.oi_proyecto_parent AS xval FROM PRY01_PROYECTOS AS PRY WHERE PRY.c_estado != \'T\' AND PRY.oi_proyecto = {#PARAM:@xval} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.name: ReporteAtencionAlCliente
method.label: Recibe dos xml, DOC y IdSel y devuelve DOC

class.help: Registra los Documentos digitales de la solicitud.
class.label: Documento Digital Solicitudes
class.name: DOC_DIG_SOL

qry:select.name: NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.DOC_DIG_SOL.QUERY
NucleusProject.Base.Project.Solicitudes.DOC_DIG_SOL.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PRY07_DOC_DIG_SOL.oi_doc_dig_sol) as CNT from PRY07_DOC_DIG_SOL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PRY07_DOC_DIG_SOL.oi_doc_dig_sol={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PRY07_DOC_DIG_SOL.d_doc_dig_sol,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PRY07_DOC_DIG_SOL.oi_doc_dig_sol,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PRY07_DOC_DIG_SOL.oi_solicitud={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
